lines.english: Chant the Praises of the Lord; Kali Yuga has come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹੁ ਜੁਗ ਕੇਰਾ ਰਹਿਆ ਤਪਾਵਸੁ ਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਦੇਹਿ ਤ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tihu jug keraa rahiaa tapaavas je gun dehi ta paaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The justice of the previous three ages is gone. One obtains virtue, only if the Lord bestows it. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬੇਦੁ ਅਥਰਬਣੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਲਹਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: baanee brahamaa bed atharaban karanee keerat lahiaa |5|
lines.english: The Guru's Bani has taken the place of Brahma's Veda, and the singing of the Lord's Praises are good deeds. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲਵਾਲੀ ਸਰਾ ਨਿਬੇੜੀ ਕਾਜੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: kal kalavaalee saraa niberree kaajee krisanaa hoaa |
lines.english: In this turbulent age of Kali Yuga, Muslim law decides the cases, and the blue-robed Qazi is the judge.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਵਿਣੁ ਪੂਜਾ ਸਤ ਵਿਣੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਜਤ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਾਹੇ ਜਨੇਊ ॥
lines.translit: pat vin poojaa sat vin sanjam jat vin kaahe janeaoo |
lines.english: Worship without faith; self-discipline without truthfulness; the ritual of the sacred thread without chastity - what good are these?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਹੁ ਧੋਵਹੁ ਤਿਲਕੁ ਚੜਾਵਹੁ ਸੁਚ ਵਿਣੁ ਸੋਚ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naavahu dhovahu tilak charraavahu such vin soch na hoee |6|
lines.english: You may bathe and wash, and apply a ritualistic tilak mark to your forehead, but without inner purity, there is no understanding. ||6||
In Kali Yuga, the Koran and the Bible have become famous.
The Pandit's scriptures and the Puraanas are not respected.
O Nanak, the Lord's Name now is Rehmaan, the Merciful.
Know that there is only One Creator of the creation. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਘਰਿ ਹੋਦੈ ਮੰਗਣਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਫਿਰਿ ਓਲਾਮਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਹੀ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: je ghar hodai mangan jaaeeai fir olaamaa milai tahee |8|1|
lines.english: If someone goes out to beg for what is already in his own home, then he should be chastised. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਏਦੂ ਉਪਰਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਨਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee edoo upar karam nahee |
lines.english: Nanak has obtained the glorious greatness of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. There is no action higher than this.
You preach to the world, and set up your house.
Raamkalee, First Mehl:
You are attached to possessiveness and the love of sexual pleasure.
You are not a renunciate, nor a man of the world. ||1||
Abandoning your Yogic postures, how will you find the True Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਬੈਸਿ ਰਹਹੁ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jogee bais rahahu dubidhaa dukh bhaagai |
lines.english: Yogi, remain seated, and the pain of duality will run away from you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਮਾਗਤ ਲਾਜ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar maagat laaj na laagai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You beg from door to door, and you don't feel ashamed. ||1||Pause||
You sing the songs, but you do not understand your own self.
and you will intuitively experience the charity of contemplation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਚੈ ਮਨ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad rachai man bhaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, let your mind be absorbed in the Lord's Love,
How will the burning pain within be relieved?
You apply ashes to your body, while acting in hypocrisy.
Your begging bowl is broken; it will not hold the charity of the Lord's Love.
Attached to Maya, you will be beaten by Death's heavy club.
You beg from Maya, lured by the three qualities.
Bound in bondage, you come and go. ||3||
You do not control your seed and semen, and yet you claim to practice abstinence.
You wear religious robes, and your patched coat assumes many disguises.
You are drowned, drowned in worldly entanglements. ||4||
You have no compassion; the Lord's Light does not shine in you.
You play all sorts of false tricks, like a juggler.
The fire of anxiety burns brightly within you.
Without the karma of good actions, how can you cross over? ||5||
You are lured by the tastes of the tongue and sex organs.
You make ear-rings of glass to wear in your ears.
But liberation does not come from learning without understanding.
The people of the world are entangled in the three modes; the Yogis are entangled in the three modes.
Through the Shabad, one becomes radiant, pure and truthful.
Contemplating the Word of the Shabad, sorrows are dispelled.
You have become a beast; this sign cannot be erased. ||6||
You establish and disestablish; whatever You do, happens.
One who contemplates the true lifestyle is a Yogi. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਪਹਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਤੂ ਕਰਣੈ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: tujh peh nau nidh too karanai jog |
lines.english: The nine treasures are with You, Lord; You are potent, the Cause of causes.
- O Nanak, that Yogi is the friend of the three worlds. ||8||2||
Raamkalee, First Mehl:
One who practices celibacy, chastity, self-control, truth and pure consciousness
Awareness of the vibration of the Word of the Shabad has been awakened deep within.
The unstruck melody of the sound current resonates and resounds within; my mind is attuned to it.
Above the six chakras of the body dwells the detached mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har har meetthaa laagai har har naam samaaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, seems sweet to the Gurmukh, who merges in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||
O mortal, through devotion to the Lord, peace is obtained.
Through the Guru's Teachings, my faith is confirmed in the True Name. ||1||
